title: How long do i need to wait to see a subbed Eva 30
display_title: How long do i need to wait to see a subbed Eva 30
wikitext:
[]: How long do i need to wait to see a subbed Eva 3.0 ? Post by Amitch1991 » Sun Sep 30, 2012 2:39 am Title says it all really, just wondering how long i will need to wait before i can download a subbed version of the movie ?

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Sep 30, 2012 2:48 am A camrip of 2.0 was circulating about six weeks after the premiere, so that'd correspond to about the end of this year if the same holds for 3.0; for a rip from optical disk, such a Japanese domestic release is likely to be about a year after the premiere, so expect it towards the very end of '13. Legit foreign releases are unlikely to emerge much before summer '14 at the very earliest.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Sep 30, 2012 11:05 am MATH Based upon available data, the Japanese home video release will come out 9.5 months after theatrical release, which would be around September 01, 2013 . There may be a a camrip before then, but it will probably look like shit, and your enjoyment of the film may be lessened as a result. So a proper, quality fansub probably won't arrive until around September 01, 2013. I don't know about UK releases, but I expect a North American release 14 months after the Japanese home video release, or around January 01, 2015 , based on available data. It really depends on how much time they spend on the home video release, and how quick domestic turnaround is. It may be earlier like Tines suggested.
